dashboard.label: Sentinel — Autonomous Incident Intelligence
dashboard.description: Real-time view of Sentinel's autonomous operations. Incidents, brain growth, and agent decisions.

search.query: | inputlookup sentinel_incidents | search status=in_progress OR status=open | stats count
index=sentinel sourcetype=sentinel:postmortem | stats dc(event.incidentId) as brain_size
index=sentinel sourcetype=sentinel:postmortem | timechart span=1h count as resolved_incidents
| inputlookup sentinel_incidents | stats count by severity
index=sentinel sourcetype=sentinel:audit | table _time event.phase event.toolCalled event.durationMs event.success event.incidentId | sort -_time | head 20
index=prod sourcetype=app earliest=-15m | stats count as event_count, count(eval(level="error")) as error_count by service | eval error_rate=round(error_count/event_count*100,1) | sort -error_rate
